summary: Iteration 14 verification: dev-admin-login, role-activity, cart lifecycle, more-from-vendor, OpenAPI, role-scoped BottomNav, /profile/complete, /creator/dashboard, /admin/login flow all verified. 12/12 backend pytest PASSED. Frontend E2E: 11/13 flows PASSED. 2 real bugs found (role-activity-dot logic + VendorDashboard missing BottomNav).

ui_bugs.issue: otherActivity counter only sums chat_unread + pending_deals; ignores creator.open_requirements (backend DOES return it). Dot never appears when only creator has activity. Fix: line ~53 add `+ (b.open_requirements || 0)`.

Page does NOT render <BottomNav/>. After switching to vendor role user lands here and loses the bottom nav entirely (breaks nav-vendor-home / nav-analytics testid regression on this specific page). CreatorDashboard + Feed + Chat etc. render nav correctly; only VendorDashboard is missing it.

action_items: Fix RoleSwitcherChip.jsx otherActivity: include (b.open_requirements || 0) so creator-role activity triggers the dot.
critical_code_review_comments: cart_routes._hydrate: silently drops cart items whose listing is soft-deleted (line 52 `continue`) — but the underlying items array in the DB still has them. Consider persistence-pruning them on hydrate so stale entries don't accumulate.

cart_routes.checkout: swallows all chat_service exceptions (line 195). If a checkout succeeds but chat send fails, buyer/vendor won't see the summary. Log the exception (logger.exception) instead of pass.

user_routes.role-activity: creator counter is `db.requirements.count_documents({status:'open'})` — this is GLOBAL, not scoped to the user. Every creator sees the same number and the dot is falsely positive. Should filter by category/subscription/skills or by requirements the creator has proposed on.
roleNav.js VENDOR_NAV vs actual VendorDashboard page — no BottomNav rendered, so vendor testids exist only on Feed/Chat/etc. Documented as an ui_bug above.
test_credentials: Admin phone 7418916209 + DEV_ADMIN_OVERRIDE_TOKEN in /app/memory/admin_phone.txt. During E2E the admin-login endpoint hit its 3/10min rate limit — used the OTP fallback (phone→OTP grep from backend.out.log→verify) and injected JWT into localStorage to complete the rest of the E2E. Fresh admin JWT if needed: obtained at 2026-07-14 15:12 UTC.
seed_data_creation: Test created 1 deal via cart checkout in test_cart_checkout (vendor of LG TV listing). Cart cleared afterwards.
context_for_next_testing_agent: If dev-admin-login rate limit is hit (3/10min/IP), fall back to OTP: POST /api/v1/auth/otp/send with admin phone from /app/memory/admin_phone.txt, then grep backend.out.log for 'Admin OTP for <phone>: <NNNNNN>' and POST /api/v1/auth/otp/verify. To bypass frontend login entirely during Playwright, inject the returned access_token/refresh_token/user JSON into localStorage keys emergent_access_token / emergent_refresh_token / emergent_user before page.goto. VendorDashboard.jsx currently has no BottomNav — check other pages if bottom nav must be verified for vendor role. Total OpenAPI ops was verified ≥140 (all 7 new paths present).
rca_of_the_issue: role-activity-dot bug RCA: backend returns per-role counters with different key names (`vendor.chat_unread + pending_deals`, `customer.chat_unread`, `creator.open_requirements`). Frontend RoleSwitcherChip.jsx line 53 hardcodes only chat_unread + pending_deals when summing. Result: creator activity is completely ignored → dot never renders when only creator has pending activity. VendorDashboard bug RCA: page component omits <BottomNav /> in JSX; unlike CreatorDashboard which explicitly imports and renders <BottomNav /> at the bottom of the tree.
